DEPT 304 JUDGE STUART R. POLLAK, ANDREA CARNEY, CLERK, CECILIA VALDEZ, CSR. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL RE: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMIS- SIONER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. APPELLANT'S CASE - ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. RESPONDENT'S CASE - ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CLOSING ARGUMENTS. THE COURT RULED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT JULIO CESAR TEJADA FOR $2662.06 IN WAGES PLUS $267.24 AS INTEREST THROUGH APRIL 14, 1998 PLUS INTEREST FROM APRIL 15, 1998 TO BE CALCULATED. JULIO CESAR TEJADA WAS AWARDED $2880.00 AS PENALTIES UNDER THE STATUTE. THE COURT RESERVED JURISDICTION OVER ATTORNEY FEES.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUJAZI, MONICA (APPELLANT) $2,662.06 PRINCIPAL, $14,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $426.36 INTEREST, $296.75 COSTS, $2,880.00 LABOR CODE SEC.203 PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,265.17, COSTS AND ATTY FEES TO BE DETERMINED BY NOTICED MOTION.
